hero.title: Welcome to Aquapark
hero.subtitle: The best summer destination for families

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a modern water park with unique attractions.

attractions.title: Attractions
attractions.subtitle: Best attractions at Aquapark Kuli Dushanbe

slide1.name: Ring Slide
slide1.desc: Thrilling ring slide for adults and kids — incredible speed and unforgettable fun!

slide2.name: Kids Zone
slide2.desc: Special area for young children with safe slides and clean water.

slide3.name: Wave Pool
slide3.desc: Huge wave pool — feel the real ocean right in the heart of the city!

slide4.name: High Slides
slide4.desc: Tall colorful slides for thrill-seekers and adrenaline lovers.

slide5.name: Relaxation Pool
slide5.desc: Large calm pool perfect for relaxing with the whole family.
